affiliate-link-checker.evidence: Edge function supabase/functions/affiliate-link-wrapper exists; writes to affiliate_clicks; FTC/Commission-linked badges in AffiliateBadge, AffiliateLinks, ProductDetail, ShopProduct, IntelligenceCommerce, blockRegistry; affiliate_links table + useAffiliateLinks CRUD; getAffiliateWrapperRedirectUrl used in Admin AffiliatesHub and business AffiliateLinks.

affiliate-link-tracker-auditor.evidence: affiliate_clicks and affiliate_links in migrations and database.types.ts; affiliate-link-wrapper logs then redirects; AffiliateLink component and getAffiliateWrapperRedirectUrl used for outbound links; Commission-linked disclosure on product and block surfaces.

authoring-core-schema-validator.evidence: affiliate_link block type in src/lib/cms/types.ts CmsBlockType; AffiliateLinkBlock in blockRegistry with type affiliate_link, component AffiliateLinkBlock; CMS_CONTENT_MODEL.md documents AffiliateLinkBlockContent (affiliate_link_id, target_url, product_id, label).

hub-shell-detector.evidence: Admin AffiliatesHub and business AffiliateLinks use useAffiliateLinks, useCreateAffiliateLink, useDeleteAffiliateLink, getAffiliateWrapperRedirectUrl; no new shells introduced; AffiliatesHub no longer coming-soon.

stripe-integration-tester.evidence: No Stripe changes in COMMERCE-POWER-01 scope; no regressions (affiliate work is separate from payments).

build.build_error: PWA service worker write failed: terser renderChunk hook did not resolve (Unexpected early exit). Pre-existing infra issue; not caused by COMMERCE-POWER-01.

block_reason: Build must exit 0 to mark COMPLETE. npm run build fails on vite-plugin-pwa/workbox terser step. COMMERCE-POWER-01 implementation complete; WO remains BLOCKED until build infra (PWA/terser) is fixed.
